steps.title: Use the request clue
steps.content: Monteiro asked friends and colleagues to bring back rare objects from international travels. That means he relied on them to obtain materials for his collection.

steps.title: Choose the reliance phrase
steps.content: Choice A describes respect, not how he got the objects. Choice B suggests conflict, and Choice C suggests danger; neither fits the cooperative request. “Depended on” means relied on, matching his need for help from travelers. The answer is D.
